title: AdapterSpec
description: Phase 5 of the DAG composer alignment plan — declarative adapter specification. Validated at config load time; the in-memory AdapterRegistry pre-registers the starter set hardcoded in adapter_registry.rs and merges any YAML-declared adapters from this directory on top.

id.description: Stable id (snake_case). Used as the cache key for adapter dispatch.

name.description: Human-readable label rendered in adapter-warning UI cards.

class.description: What kind of work the adapter does. Drives composer-side dispatch.

safety.description: Safety class. Lossless can be auto-inserted; LossyDeclared requires assumption-ledger entry; ScientificallyRisky requires explicit SME confirmation; PolicyRestricted is refused outside approved pipelines.

from_format.description: Optional source format / data EDAM IRI. Omit for wildcard.

to_format.description: Optional destination format / data EDAM IRI. Omit for wildcard.

from_semantic_type.description: Optional source semantic type stable id.

to_semantic_type.description: Optional destination semantic type stable id.

rationale.description: Free-text rationale rendered in CompatibilityProof.rationale when this adapter is inserted. Should explain what the adapter does + what could go wrong.

validators.description: v3 alignment Phase 3 (F10) — validators auto-attached to every consumer port connected via this adapter. Every Lossless adapter MUST carry at least one validator so the contracted output shape is checked rather than trusted.
